content: Demo consent banner from the Desiderio styleguide for the fictional webconsulting studio site. Choose which cookie categories to allow — connect it to your consent management tool before go-live.

cookie_categories.name: Essential
cookie_categories.description_text: Required for core features like security and your saved choices.

cookie_categories.name: Analytics
cookie_categories.description_text: Anonymous usage data that helps us prioritise improvements.

cookie_categories.name: Marketing
cookie_categories.description_text: Used to measure campaigns and show more relevant content.
